description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by dense green hedges and mature trees, providing privacy and a natural boundary. The structure features a flat roof with clean, geometric lines and extensive use of glass, especially on the upper terrace and pool area, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The front includes a covered carport with space for at least one vehicle, and the main entrance is set back behind a hedge. A prominent feature is the elevated swimming pool with transparent railings, which extends from the side of the house and is visible from multiple angles. The rear and side facades reveal large sliding glass doors and open-plan living spaces, with a rooftop terrace accessible from the upper level. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, open space, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with extensive glass, a rooftop terrace, and an elevated swimming pool, surrounded by lush hedges and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, main entrance, and dense hedges with a glimpse of the rooftop terrace and pool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open-plan living area, large glass windows, and the full length of the elevated pool.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the rooftop terrace, pool, and private backyard area with surrounding greenery.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the flat roof, terrace, and the integration of the house with the surrounding hedges and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
